summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Adaptive Retrieval RAG System. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional - upload, chat, tabs, mode switcher, export PDF all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~393 lines and manageable; however the confidence value returned is very low (e.g. 2.99e-05) due to raw cosine similarity scores not being normalized — minor UX concern but not a bug
No rate limiting or file size validation on /api/documents/upload — potential abuse vector for production
seed_data_creation: Uploaded test_ai.txt via backend test; doc ID 6c6dfb64-6e5e-411e-8a0e-8b3180b815d0 created
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs functional. Chat returns answer/confidence/sources/rewritten_query. Frontend tabs (Chat, Compare Docs, Document Map) all clickable. Mode switcher (Hybrid/Vector/Keyword) present. Upload zone in sidebar. Export PDF button visible. End-to-end chat flow tested and working with Groq LLM.
